headline: Broadcom unveils custom AI chip for OpenAI
detail: Broadcom is directly challenging Nvidia by building a dedicated AI chip for OpenAI, signaling growing demand for custom silicon. This is directly relevant to AVGO, your largest (and currently underwater) position — it could drive a short-term bounce. Don't confuse a news pop with a trend reversal; you're down 12% on a margin position and the scanner says TRIM.

headline: Amazon Zoox redesigned robotaxi unveiled
detail: Zoox is pushing forward on autonomous vehicles ahead of expansion, keeping the robotaxi/AV race in the spotlight. This broadly supports sentiment around tech innovation names in your book like CRWD and PLTR indirectly, but has no direct earnings impact on your holdings today.

headline: Tesla and Waymo robotaxi competition heats up
detail: The robotaxi narrative is intensifying, with a third major spender highlighted who builds no cars. This keeps autonomous and AI infrastructure themes alive, which supports sentiment for tech and chip names broadly — a tailwind for SMH and QQQ, your two HOLD names currently in the green.
